aboutpara: Software engineer focused on building AI-enabled SaaS products, low-latency APIs, and reliable distributed systems. I work across FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, React, and Next.js to ship production-grade systems that scale cleanly and stay observable under load.

resume.tagline: Software Engineer | Full-Stack Backend | AI-Enabled SaaS
resume.description: I build resilient, multi-tenant products with strong API design, optimized data models, and polished user experiences. My recent work spans real-time support systems, call analytics, and analytics dashboards serving production workloads at scale.

bullets: Engineered AI-enabled, multi-tenant backend services using FastAPI and Node.js, processing 50K+ workloads per month and 10K+ daily API requests with 99.8-99.9% uptime.
Architected distributed pipelines with AWS S3, PostgreSQL, async queues, and real-time services, supporting 2K+ concurrent jobs and reducing system failures by 85%.
Built low-latency JWT/RBAC-secured REST APIs with sub-200ms p95 response times for call analytics, customer support, and campaign workflows.
Designed optimized PostgreSQL models with indexing and pooling, cutting query latency by 75% while maintaining 99.9% availability under concurrent load.
Delivered React and Next.js dashboards for analytics and campaign management, reducing bundle size by 40% and achieving 95+ Lighthouse scores.
Built and maintained React interfaces for internal product workflows and customer-facing features.
Collaborated with backend teams to integrate APIs, refine data flows, and improve cross-functional delivery speed.
Worked on data processing and analysis tasks with a focus on accuracy, repeatability, and actionable reporting.
Supported experimentation and insight generation for training and product-side decision making.
